subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath appeared before the Throne, and towards it have been directed the glances of God, the King, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the Omnipotent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدی العرش کتابک و ارتد الیه لحاظ الله الملک المقتدر العزیز القدیر و توجه الیه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
